response.justification: Bogdan brings 16+ years of polyglot full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS CDK, and Docker/Kubernetes all present in recent roles. Most notably, his current position at re:cinq includes explicit AI agent infrastructure work — MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks — which is a specific and differentiating job requirement. His practitioner-level TDD culture, evidenced by open-source testing libraries and community workshops, signals strong code quality ownership. The primary gaps are the absence of explicit Nest.js and Kotlin mentions, though his Node.js depth and demonstrated polyglot adaptability make these low-risk onboarding items.
strengths: Active AI agent infrastructure work at re:cinq including MCP frameworks and agentic workflows — directly satisfies a specific and uncommon job requirement
Deep TypeScript/Node.js stack with React, MongoDB, AWS CDK, Docker, and Kubernetes all represented in recent, relevant roles
Practitioner-level TDD discipline: authored open-source testing libraries (Fluent-Asserts, Trial) and ran community TDD/refactoring workshops over many years
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js despite it being the primary backend framework in the stack — degree of ramp-up required is unknown
Kotlin is entirely absent from the resume; Java appears only in older embedded and robotics contexts, not modern backend services
Relational database experience (PostgreSQL, MySQL) is sparse and not prominently featured compared to the MongoDB and NoSQL emphasis across the resume
